en: Are you high again?
Well done, Columbo. You need to slow down, Fred.
Don't be such a bore. I'm here, aren't I? Are you?
ko: 지루하게 굴지 마. 내가 여기 있잖아. 너는?

en: I don't care if you're shit-faced.
As long as you can sing.
No, John, I don't want to play it. Then I'm all for it.
ko: 아니, 존. 그거 하고 싶지 않아. 그럼 난 찬성해.

en: What's that supposed to mean? I'm tired of the bloody anthems.
ko: 그게 무슨 뜻이야? 지겨운 국가가 질렸어.

en: I want the energy in the clubs. The bodies.
I want to make people move.
You mean disco? Why not?
Do you mind pissing off?
I'm not pissing off. This is a band discussion. Drum loops. Synthesizers.
ko: 나는 안 꺼져. 이건 밴드 토론이야. 드럼 루프. 신디사이저.

en: If you say so.
It's not us. Us?
It's not Queen.
Queen is whatever I say it is.
Well, you can play your own bloody drums, then. Fred.
ko: 그럼 네 드럼이나 치면 돼, 프레드.

en: OK. Let's see how good a boxer you really are. Roger.
ko: 좋아. 네가 진짜 복서인지 한번 보자. 로저. 진정해.

en: Take it easy.
All right, Muhammad Ali. That's...
That's quite a cool riff, actually.
You wrote that?
